name: vite
usage_summary: Central build and test tool for both ui-extensions packages. ui-extensions-dev-console/vite.config.mts uses defineConfig() with the React plugin to compile the dev-console React app. ui-extensions-server-kit/vite.config.mts uses defineConfig() to build the library in CJS+ESM formats and also uses a custom Vite plugin (Plugin type imported from 'vite') defined in scripts/create-entry-files.ts. Both packages use vitest (which runs under Vite) as the test runner via the 'test' key in their vite config.
how_to_remove: Would require replacing both the build pipeline (switching to esbuild, rollup, or tsup) and the test runner (switching to jest or node --test). The custom create-entry-files Vite plugin would also need to be rewritten. Significant effort across two packages.
replacement_reason: Vite is the foundational build and test infrastructure for the ui-extensions packages. Replacing it is a large multi-step migration with no compelling reason to do so.
